name: Contract Center
description: Auxiliary contract management surface for browsing the contract library, reviewing redlined documents with tracked changes, and comparing versions side-by-side.

page_briefs.contracts: Contract library list page. A filter-bar at the top offers facets for counterparty, contract type, status, effective date, and assigned attorney. Below, a full-width data-table lists contracts with columns for title, counterparty, type, status, value, renewal date, and owner, supporting sort, multi-select, and bulk export.
page_briefs.contract-detail: Single contract review view. Main area renders redline-track-changes showing the document with inline insertions, deletions, and margin comments from reviewers. Below, a split contract-diff panel lets the user pivot between the current draft and any prior version with side-by-side clause comparison.
page_briefs.contract-compare: Dedicated side-by-side comparison page. The contract-diff split pane anchors the top with full documents aligned clause-by-clause. Below, a diff-view split pane zooms into a selected clause, highlighting character-level additions and removals for precise redline inspection.
